title: cirsium elatum
intro: Cirsium elatum, also known as tall thistle or alpine thistle, is a perennial flowering plant native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Cirsium elatum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cirsium elatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
